challenges.title: Blog Layout
challenges.description: Create a blog layout with a header, featured post, grid of recent posts, sidebar with categories, and footer.
hints: Use grid-template-areas for the main layout
Use nested grids for the post grid
Make the sidebar stack below on mobile
Add a sticky header on scroll

challenges.title: E-Commerce Product Page
challenges.description: Build a product page layout with image gallery, product details, related products grid, and customer reviews section.
hints: Use a 2-column grid for image + details
Use auto-fill grid for related products
Ensure the page is fully responsive

challenges.title: Responsive Dashboard
challenges.description: Create a dashboard layout with a sidebar menu, top header, and multiple card/widget areas that reorganize on different screen sizes.
hints: Use CSS Grid for the main structure
Collapse sidebar to icons on tablet
Full mobile stack on small screens
